mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger (messenger_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, send_time, read_status) VALUES (#{messengerId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM messenger WHERE sender_id = #{empId} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT * FROM messenger WHERE receiver_id = #{empId} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messenger WHERE receiver_id = #{empId} AND read_status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE messenger SET read_status = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger_files (file_id, messenger_id, file_path) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{messengerId}, #{filePath})
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM employee WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
